main.java.br.usp.icmc.scc0204.javacafe.model

Interface CafeSystemContract

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    CafeSystem

    public interface CafeSystemContract
    Main contract for the Java Café Point of Sale System. Defines core operations for Order Processing, Inventory Management, and Sales Reporting.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addItemToOrder(Order order, Product product, int quantity) 
      void addProduct(Product product) 
      double calculateSubtotal(Order order) 
      double calculateTax(Order order) 
      double calculateTotal(Order order) 
      Order createOrder() 
      void finalizeOrder(Order order, PaymentMethod paymentMethod) 
      java.lang.String generateReceipt(Order order) 
      java.util.List<Product> getAllProducts() 
      Report getDailyReport() 
      java.util.List<Product> getLowStockProducts(int threshold) 
      Report getMonthlyReport() 
      Report getWeeklyReport() 
      void removeItemFromOrder(Order order, Product product, int quantity) 
      void updateProduct(Product product)
      Updates an existing product in the inventory.
      void updateStock(java.lang.String productId, int newQuantity)
